title: Everbuild Stick 2 All Purpose High Bond Strength Contact Spray Adhesive, 500 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
PREMIUM GRADE– A rubber-based adhesive that is perfect for both professional and DIY use. Ideal for bonding polyurethane foam or mineral wood panels to plasterboard.
QUICK CURING – Bonds metals to most surfaces and laminates.
MULTI-USE – Suitable for bonding wood, rubber, most plastics, leather, cork, lino and rigid PVC.
EXCELLENT ADHESION – Outperforms conventional wood glues by adhering to most common surfaces.
VERSATILE – As this Everbuild stick 2 has excellent weather and aging properties it can be used for both internal and external use.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? The surfaces to be glued should be clean and free from dust, grease and other contaminants. Shake the can well before use and select the fan width by turning the nozzle to the desired position. Spray adhesive from 6-8 inches (15-20 cm) away onto one or both surfaces; depending on the type of surface/strength of bond required. Apply 1–3 coats to both surfaces. Let solvent evaporate (30s), then press together firmly from the centre outwards for strong bonding. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
